hero.title: Modern School Management System
hero.subtitle: Multi-tenant SaaS platform for educational institutions
hero.ctaHint: New to Stunity? Register your school to get started.

features.title: Why Choose Stunity Enterprise?
features.subtitle: Everything you need to run and grow your school in one place.
features.multiTenantDesc: Each school gets isolated data and customization
features.socialDesc: Integrated feed, polls, comments, and notifications

login.title: Welcome Back
login.subtitle: Login to your school account
login.errorPlaceholder: Please enter your email or phone and password

auth.title: Welcome Back
auth.subtitle: Sign in to continue
auth.welcomeSubtitle: Connecting students, teachers, and parents in one seamless enterprise platform.

passwordReset.forgotSubtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
passwordReset.checkEmailBody: If an account exists for {email}, we've sent password reset instructions.
passwordReset.invalidLinkBody: This password reset link is invalid or has expired.
passwordReset.passwordResetBody: Your password has been updated. You can now log in.
passwordReset.newPasswordSubtitle: Create a strong password for your account.
passwordReset.resetFailed: Failed to reset password. The link may have expired.

registerSchool.title: Register your school
registerSchool.subtitle: Apply for a platform account
registerSchool.submittedBody: Your school account is ready. You can log in now and complete onboarding while platform review continues in parallel. High-risk actions (claim code distribution and bulk invites) unlock after final approval.
registerSchool.khmMoeysHelp: We will pre-load 15 standard MoEYS subjects per grade, 13 Cambodian public holidays, and a standard 2-semester academic year.
registerSchool.euStandardHelp: We will create a 2-term academic year now. A starter subject pack will be suggested during onboarding, and you can add your local public holidays later.
registerSchool.internationalBaccalaureateHelp: We will create a 3-term academic year now. An IB-style starter subject pack will be suggested during onboarding, and you can add your local public holidays later.
registerSchool.customModelHelp: We will create a basic calendar scaffold only. Subjects and holidays stay manual so you can configure everything from scratch.

parentAuth.loginHelp: Login with the phone number you registered during your child's enrollment.
parentAuth.needHelp: Need help? Contact your school administrator.

parentAuth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
parentAuth.registrationSuccess: Registration successful! Please login with your credentials.
parentAuth.registerFailed: Failed to register. Please try again.

attendance.title: ATTENDANCE
attendance.notLinkedMsg: You must be linked to a school to use the attendance feature. Please ask your administrator to invite you or provide a claim code.
attendance.permissionNote: Permission requested online. GPS verification is not required for this session.

requestPermission.title: Request Permission Online
requestPermission.subtitle: Ask permission anywhere, even outside campus geofence.
requestPermission.reasonPlaceholder: Write a short reason (medical appointment, urgent family matter, transport issue...)
requestPermission.clearProfessional: Please keep your reason clear and professional.

attendance.geofencingActive: Enterprise Geofencing Active. Your location is only recorded during check-in/out for verification.

alerts.enableLocationMessage: Please enable location services in your device settings to check in.

alerts.alreadyRecordedMessage: {{session}} session already has attendance recorded today.
alerts.reasonRequiredMessage: Please enter a short reason for your permission request.

report.title: Attendance Report
report.performanceSummaryDescription: Your attendance is calculated based on morning and afternoon sessions since the beginning of the semester.
